title: Smart Connection Checks & Quick Reporting! 🌐🪲
message: Never get left in the dark! This update introduces automatic network connectivity diagnostics to keep you informed, alongside an instantaneous direct feedback mechanism to report app bugs directly to our team.
points: 🌐 Smart Connection Diagnostics: If your feed runs into an unexpected internet dropout or ad-blocker restriction, the app will now gracefully show a clear diagnostic message instead of an unhelpful empty state.
🪲 Instant Feedback Option: Encountered a persistent glitch? Tap the new integrated 'Report Issue' button directly from the empty feed view to alert us immediately.
🛡️ Ad Delivery Protection: Upgraded the underlying Interstitial and Rewarded systems to safely verify successful ad playback before running features, shielding users from deadlocks.

title: Instant Startup & Secure Mixes! ⚡🎬
message: We've listened to your feedback! This update introduces a highly requested option to completely skip the opening splash video, along with vital security and limit enhancements across your custom feeds.
points: 🎬 Toggle Splash Video: Take control of your startup experience! Go to the Library tab to completely turn off the opening animation and jump straight to your news feed instantly.
🔒 Secure Quick Mix Builder: Upgraded custom mix profiles with premium gating checks to protect your feed data integrity.
🛠️ Layout & Syntax Polish: Resolved layout glitches across tab configurations and fixed syntax constraints to keep your app running smoothly.

title: The Ultimate Reading Experience! 📖⚡
message: We've completely upgraded how you read articles. Say goodbye to web clutter and hello to lightning-fast, distraction-free news.
points: 👓 Clean Reader Mode: Instantly switch between the live website and a beautiful, ad-free text view with a single tap.
⚡ Quick Read (Focus Mode): Read 2x faster! Turn this on to bold the start of every word, boosting your focus and reading speed.
📊 Reading Progress Bar: A sleek new indicator lets you know exactly how far you are in the story.
🛠️ Smoother Transitions: Faster article loading and seamless shifting between web and reader views.

title: Welcome to the Update Hub! ✨🚀
message: We're constantly making Newszio better for you! We've built a beautiful new way to keep you informed about all the latest features, fixes, and app magic right here inside the app. 🎉
points: 📱 Interactive Update Screen: A sleek, engaging new dialog to see exactly what has changed.
💡 Never Miss a Feature: Easily discover our latest tools and improvements the moment they drop.
⚡ Lightning Fast: We've tuned up the engine with major UI performance boosts and under-the-hood stability tweaks.
